title: Noah Lucas homepage v048 swapped theme text, mobile priority roles, and true night bridge
changeSummary: Restructures the page as identity, contact actions, employer logos, experience, philosophy, research, writing, investments, and contact.
Uses the supplied physical-world systems positioning statement and removes the extra methods, skills, and expertise block from the hero.
Renames Operating Principles to Philosophy and removes the separate Product Methodologies section from the canonical staging hierarchy.
Replaces the three-item Sift carousel with the rocket-firing segment only.
Replaces the three-item Anduril carousel with the flying Ghost drone video only.
Removes both cards' alternate video elements and navigation dots while preserving the existing layout, copy, background, and Sift segment loop.
Corrects the flex ordering so the experience cards follow the logo row, followed by Philosophy, Research, Writing, Investments, and Contact.
Removes the obsolete ten-second carousel playback lock and immediately starts both muted single videos with eager preload.
Swaps the theme text treatment so light mode uses white text and night mode uses black text.
On mobile, shows only the Sift and Anduril employer marks and explicitly keeps both associated experience cards visible.
Uses the existing faithful nighttime Golden Gate cockpit image for night mode while retaining the day image for light mode.

validation.method: Artifact integrity, CSS cascade, source selection, mobile selector, image dimensions, and asset lineage checks. The browser QA surface was unavailable.

supersedesReason: Implements the requested inverse theme text colors, mobile Sift/Anduril priority, and distinct dark-mode Golden Gate background.
